market_brief.AMZN: Facing investor caution over $200B projected 2026 capex for AI/robotics, but AWS growth and custom silicon execution remain key long-term drivers.
market_brief.INTC: Struggling with PC market decline and high foundry operating losses, while facing new ARM-based competition in data centers.
market_brief.AAPL: Navigating China market headwinds while expanding AI integration for Siri and monetizing services through new advertising initiatives.
